mapper.select: SELECT onboarding_id as "id", supplier_id as "supplierId", applicant_name as "applicantName", business_name as "businessName", business_type as "businessType", documents_json as "documentsJson", verification_notes as "verificationNotes", training_progress as "trainingProgress", training_completed_modules_json as "trainingCompletedModulesJson", resubmission_count as "resubmissionCount", rejection_reason as "rejectionReason", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", submitted_at as "submittedAt", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM hm_query.onboarding_flat WHERE onboarding_id = #{id}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.onboarding_flat WHERE state_id IN ('DOCUMENTS_SUBMITTED', 'UNDER_REVIEW')

SELECT onboarding_id as "id", supplier_id as "supplierId", applicant_name as "applicantName", business_name as "businessName", business_type as "businessType", state_id as "stateId", submitted_at as "submittedAt", created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.onboarding_flat WHERE state_id IN ('DOCUMENTS_SUBMITTED', 'UNDER_REVIEW') ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT onboarding_id as "id", supplier_id as "supplierId", applicant_name as "applicantName", business_name as "businessName", business_type as "businessType", training_progress as "trainingProgress", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", submitted_at as "submittedAt", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM hm_query.onboarding_flat WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.onboarding_flat GROUP BY state_id
